_comment: BL-547 Slice 1 — informal structural reference for Model Steward's registry shape. Not a JSON Schema validator; model_steward_lib.bb is the executable source of truth. Runtime state lives at .swarmforge/model-steward/registry.json, seeded from seed/models.seed.json on first read.

model_registry_entry.cost_class: string, one of: low | medium | high
model_registry_entry.certification_report_path: string relative to the state dir (e.g. "certification-reports/anthropic__claude-sonnet-5__<ts>.json"), or null if never certified
model_registry_entry.last_regression_reason: string, present only after a decertify; describes the regression that triggered it

role_matrix_entry._key: role name, e.g. "coder" (must match one of: architect, coder, cleaner, QA, hardender, documenter, specifier)
role_matrix_entry.score: number, higher ranks first; role_recommendations excludes non-certified models unless include-uncertified? is set

adapter_catalogue_entry.production_default: boolean — true only for a certified model's default adapter; a candidate model may list an adapter here for evaluation without this being true

certification_report.gates: array (Slice 1: empty — no automated benchmark ingestion yet; Slice 2's evaluate populates this)
certification_report.reason: string, present only on a regressed report
certification_report.prior_report: the certification_report this one regressed from, present only on a regressed report
